name: Cranberry Cheesecake Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Prepare crusts according to package directions for either a 9-inch pie or a 10-inch tart (using a pan with a removable bottom).
3. Bake the crusts for 9-11 minutes, until lightly golden brown. Prick the bottom of the crust with a fork before continuing.
4. Lower the oven temperature to 375°F.
5. Combine the cranberry sauce, pecans, 1/3 cup sugar, and cornstarch in the pie shell.
6. In a separate bowl, beat the cream cheese, 1/2 cup granulated sugar, milk, and eggs at medium speed until smooth.
7. Spread the cream cheese mixture evenly over the cranberry layer.
8. Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until set.
9. Mix the sour cream, remaining sugar, and vanilla extract in a bowl until well blended.
10. Spread the mixture evenly over the pie crust.
11. Bake for an additional 5 minutes.
12. Allow the pie to cool completely before serving.
Per serving: 461 calories, 6g protein, 53g carbohydrates, 26g fat (51%), 89mg cholesterol, 283mg sodium, 1g fiber. Adapted from a recipe in Woman's Day Holiday Baking 1995.
